scripts.electron:admin: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VECTOR_PROFILE=admin-device VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.electron:ivan: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VECTOR_PROFILE=ivan-device VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.electron:petr: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VECTOR_PROFILE=petr-device VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-windows.ps1
scripts.installer:win: npm run package:win && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-inno-installer.ps1
